top_signals.title: Hong Kong Dollar Hits 10-Month Low as Fed View Buoys Greenback
top_signals.summary: The Hong Kong dollar fell to its weakest level against the US dollar in about 10 months, as a stronger greenback and expectations for further Federal Reserve rate hikes pressured Asian currencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Singapore's Ascott sees Asian tourists staying close to home after Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Slump 6% as Chipmakers Hit by Renewed Selloff
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks fell as renewed selling in chipmakers highlighted their heightened sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment.

top_signals.title: Britain and Switzerland break June temperature record as deadly heat wave grips Europe
top_signals.summary: The early summer heat wave has killed dozens, disrupted power supplies, and closed schools and cultural landmarks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stellantis and Nissan in talks to buy assets from troubled Marelli
top_signals.summary: Marelli is going through a complex and lengthy restructuring process after filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy one year ago.
